title: WHERE clause with AND NOT is broken
poc:
CREATE TABLE "test"."tbl1" (
          "id"          int           NOT NULL,
          "id1"         int           NOT NULL,
          "id2"         int           NOT NULL,
          "name"        varchar(300)  NOT NULL,
          CONSTRAINT "test_id_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id"),
          CONSTRAINT "test_id1_name_unique" UNIQUE ("id1", "name")
 )
 ;

SELECT
         (1) as "a"
 FROM 
         tbl1
 WHERE 
         id1 = 2;

SELECT
         (1) as "a"
 FROM 
         tbl1
 WHERE (
                    id1 = 1
         AND        name = 'one' 
         AND NOT    id = 1
 ) 
 ;
key_bug_features: WHERE clause with AND NOT fails to return expected results
bug_features_seed:
SELECT
         (1) as "result"
 FROM 
         "test"."tbl2"
 WHERE 
         value > 15.0
         AND NOT description IS NULL;

SELECT
         (1) as "result"
 FROM 
         "test"."tbl2"
 WHERE 
         id = 1
         AND NOT value < 10.0;
